languages.text: "По полученным донесениям, Ваша Светлость, они появились в районе раскопок, которые мы вели по вашему приказанию".
"According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."
languages.original_text: "По полученным донесениям, Ваша Светлость, они появились в районе раскопок, которые мы вели по вашему приказанию".

traits.locale_text: "According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."
"According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."
"According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."
"According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."

languages.text: “根据收到的报告，大人，它们是从我们奉您之命开挖的那处遗迹里冒出来的。”
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."

traits.locale_text: “根据收到的报告，大人，它们是从我们奉您之命开挖的那处遗迹里冒出来的。”

languages.text: "Alınan raporlara göre {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, emirleriniz üzerine kazı alanında ortaya çıkmışlar."
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."

traits.locale_text: "Alınan raporlara göre {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, emirleriniz üzerine kazı alanında ortaya çıkmışlar."

languages.text: « D'après les rapports que nous avons reçus, Votre Seigneurie, elles sont sorties du site de fouilles que nous avons établi selon vos ordres. »
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."

traits.locale_text: « D'après les rapports que nous avons reçus, Votre Seigneurie, elles sont sorties du site de fouilles que nous avons établi selon vos ordres. »

languages.text: «Según los informes que he recibido, mi{mf|lord|lady}, surgieron de la excavación que realizamos a sus órdenes».
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."

traits.locale_text: «Según los informes que he recibido, mi{mf|lord|lady}, surgieron de la excavación que realizamos a sus órdenes».

languages.text: "Den Berichten zufolge kommen sie aus der Ausgrabung, die wir auf Euren Befehl hin begonnen haben, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."

traits.locale_text: "Den Berichten zufolge kommen sie aus der Ausgrabung, die wir auf Euren Befehl hin begonnen haben, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: 「報告によると、ご命で始めた発掘現場から、彼らは現れたそうです」
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, they emerged at the dig site we started on your orders."

traits.locale_text: 「報告によると、ご命で始めた発掘現場から、彼らは現れたそうです」
